description:

title: Incubator kitchen, pavilion to open in downtown Logansport
description:

description:

title: After yearlong pause, Amelia Earhart expedition set to begin in October
description:
Purdue announced Friday, which also would have been Earhart's 129th birthday, that the Taraia Object Expedition will depart in the first week of October with the approval of the Republic of Kirabati government.

description:

title: Bid to question voters central in recount of Indiana Senate race separated by 3 votes
description:
The Indiana Recount Commission is set to take up claims from Paula Copenhaver next week in what certified results show as a three-vote loss to Sen. Spencer Deery of West Lafayette in the May Republican primary.
